name: Prairie Farms Dairy Inc.
description: Prairie Farms Dairy, Inc. is a cooperative owned by over 600 farm families dedicated to providing high-quality milk. Their focus on continuous improvement and the use of technology ensures the production of fresh milk, which is essential for making butter.

name: Gloria
description: Gloria is a prominent manufacturer in the Peruvian dairy market, specializing in a variety of dairy products, including butter (Mantequilla Gloria). The company's strong brand presence underscores its commitment to high-quality food and beverage offerings.

name: Meadow
description: Meadow is the UK's largest butteroil plant, supplying bulk butter, butteroils, and ghee to major food manufacturers across the UK, Europe, and worldwide. Their expertise and capacity in butter production position them as a key player in the industry's supply chain.

name: BUTTER Music and Sound
description: Butter is an international music and sound company that emphasizes the importance of collaboration in fostering creativity.

name: Baldor Specialty Foods Inc.
description: The company, Baldor Specialty Foods, offers a variety of dairy products, including butter and cream cheese. They emphasize their commitment to delivering high-quality fresh produce and specialty foods.

name: Grassland Dairy Products
description: Grassland Dairy proudly offers a range of nutritious dairy ingredients, including their foodservice Non-GMO Project Verified Butter.

name: nzmp
description: NZMP offers a diverse range of butter products, including salted and unsalted options, catering to various preferences and culinary needs. With a commitment to innovation and quality, NZMP provides high-performing dairy ingredients trusted by renowned brands globally.

name: Wolf ButterBack
description: Wolf ButterBack is a leading manufacturer and supplier of frozen baked goods in Germany and Europe, ensuring high-quality products made from the best raw materials.

name: Banner Butter
description: Banner Butter is a small-batch butter made from patiently-cultured cream sourced from hormone-free, grass-fed cows, ensuring a better taste without the need for added flavorings. Their careful churning process allows for adjustments that enhance flavor, making it a high-quality choice for butter lovers.

name: Gay Lea Foods
description: Gay Lea Foods is a prominent player in the Canadian dairy sector, producing a diverse range of high-quality dairy products, including an exciting line of premium butters that offer unique flavors and textures. Their commitment to innovation and quality ensures that whether for baking or cooking, their specialty butters enhance culinary experiences.
